# IICA — International Indian Culture & Arts

IICA is India's premier platform for performing artists — classical musicians, dancers, and cultural performers. We provide premium artist branding, SEO-powered life journey documentation, and international outreach solutions.

## About

IICA (International Indian Culture & Arts) empowers Indian performing artists to build professional brands, grow their earnings, and connect with audiences globally. We serve 500+ artists across classical music, dance, and traditional performing arts.

## Pages

- [Home](https://iifc.vercel.app/) — Platform overview, artist network, talk show, and membership
- [Artists](https://iifc.vercel.app/artists) — Browse IICA artist profiles
- [Increase Earnings](https://iifc.vercel.app/increase-earnings) — How IICA helps artists increase brand earnings by 80%
- [Relaunch Brand](https://iifc.vercel.app/relaunch-brand) — Brand relaunch and performing arts professional preparation
- [CEO's Desk](https://iifc.vercel.app/ceo) — Message and vision from IICA leadership
- [About Us](https://iifc.vercel.app/about) — Mission, team, and history
- [Events](https://iifc.vercel.app/events) — Upcoming and past events
- [Jobs & Gigs](https://iifc.vercel.app/jobs) — Opportunities for artists
